case_title: SZLOS ANTIQUES, INC. VS. RUBY LANE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SZLOS ANTIQUES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUBY LANE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RUBY LANE, INC.

NOT REPORTED. (D506).
